name: ti4-hgm-auto-commit
description: Auto-commit major work after tests pass, features implemented, or hardware verified

actions.name: generate_commit_message
actions.command: powershell -Command "$changed = git diff --cached --name-only; $summary = 'feat: TI4-HGM'; if ($changed -match 'test_') { $summary += ' - tests passing' }; if ($changed -match 'main|config') { $summary += ' - pico deployment' }; if ($changed -match 'hub_engine') { $summary += ' - state machine' }; echo $summary"
